heading: Definitions
label: 40312 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14612 of Title 42

children.heading: Attorney General
children.label: 1 Attorney General
children.text: The term “Attorney General” means the Attorney General of the United States.

children.heading: Compact
children.label: 2 Compact
children.text: The term “Compact” means the National Crime Prevention and Privacy Compact set forth in .section 40316 of this title

children.heading: Council
children.label: 3 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the Compact Council established under Article VI of the Compact.

children.heading: FBI
children.label: 4 FBI
children.text: The term “FBI” means the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

children.heading: Party State
children.label: 5 Party State
children.text: The term “Party State” means a State that has ratified the Compact.

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” means any State, territory, or possession of the United States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.
